Topics I cover

Training designed around real workplace needs

Each session is built around a practical, everyday challenge — not generic curriculum.

Employees use AI tools every day but don't always understand the risks — data leakage, hallucinations, prompt injection.

AI Awareness Training

MFA and SSO are in place, but users still fall for phishing and make avoidable security mistakes.

Cybersecurity Awareness Training

Teams adopting Okta, Entra ID or Oracle IDCS need clear, practical training to get the most out of these platforms.

IAM Platform Training

A workforce needs practical digital skills — not just access to new technology and tools.

Digital Skills Training

Identity & Access Management (IAM)

My core training specialty

Grounded in real Oracle Identity Cloud Service (IDCS) experience — practical training and platform familiarisation for IT teams, business teams and individuals building careers in identity and security.

Core Specialty

Identity & Access Management (IAM)

IAM Training · Okta · Microsoft Entra ID · SC-300 Awareness

Why IAM matters: Identity is now the primary security perimeter. Teams need employees, administrators and business leaders who understand access governance, MFA, SSO, identity lifecycle management and Zero Trust principles. I help build both practical IAM skills and IAM awareness.

Okta Microsoft Entra ID Oracle IDCS Ping Identity

IAM Awareness Training

For employees, managers & compliance teams — understanding identity risk, Zero Trust and access governance without the jargon.

What is IAM & why it matters Zero Trust fundamentals SSO & MFA in practice Access governance & risk Identity lifecycle management

Platform & Product Training

For IT teams, job seekers & career transition professionals — hands-on platform familiarisation aligned to certification paths.

Admin console & configuration User provisioning & lifecycle SSO & MFA setup Integration & federation basics Certification prep

Aligned to Okta Certified Professional and Microsoft SC-300 (Identity and Access Administrator) certification paths

IAM Concepts for Decision Makers

For leadership & teams evaluating platforms — clarity on identity posture and platform fit, explained without jargon.

IAM fundamentals walkthrough Access governance basics Platform comparison overview Explaining IAM to non-technical teams

My approach

How I structure a training journey

A simple, four-part approach that underpins every session — moving from securing the basics to building lasting digital capability.

01

Secure

Cybersecurity awareness — reducing the human risk factor

02

Identify

IAM and access governance — identity as the security perimeter

03

Enable

AI adoption and productivity — practical, safe, everyday use

04

Transform

Experiential learning and digital capability — lasting behavioural change

Secure · Identify · Enable · Transform
